'''Jaret''' was the son of [[Garth (Senali)|Garth]] and [[Ganeed]], and nephew of the [[King/Legends|King]] [[Meenon]] of [[Senali]]. He married [[Mesan (Senali)|Mesan]] and had one child, [[Tawn]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Shattered Peace]]'' {{1st}}
